title: urena praemorsa
intro: Urena praemorsa, also known as prickly cocklebur, is a type of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and Asia, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other health conditions. Urena praemorsa can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be applied topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
